prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第19位（Top20），近年排名稳定，属于全国顶尖高校梯队；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第37位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022年江西省曾出现投档线位次大幅下降的异常信号，但属低关注度事件，对当前报考心理影响有限；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达18个，其中教育学、心理学、中国语言文学、中国史、地理学、马克思主义理论获评A+，数学、统计学、生态学、体育学、外国语言文学、环境科学与工程获评A，学科实力居全国师范类之首。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近3年加速）、2026年扩招约9.8%的缓冲作用、河北省考生总数小幅增加以及学校顶尖层次（Top20）的稳定吸引力，考虑位次后移趋势较强但扩招有缓冲，小幅上调50名；预测2026年物理类最低位次约5951名，区间5451–6451名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1730 → 1776 → 2786 → 3823 → 5573, with a continuous backward shift for 5 consecutive years, accelerating notably in the last 3 years (a shift of 1037 places from 2023 to 2024, and 1750 places from 2024 to 2025). The 2025 baseline is about 5573. The university has been steadily expanding its enrollment in Hebei Province for Physics Category: 39 students in 2021, 42 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 51 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 56 students, an increase of about 9.8% compared to 2025, which provides some buffer against the backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. In 2022, Jiangxi Province experienced an abnormal signal of a significant drop in the admission line ranking, but this is a low-attention event with limited impact on current application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 18 disciplines were rated A- or above, including Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory receiving A+, and Mathematics, Statistics, Ecology, Physical Education, Foreign Language and Literature, and Environmental Science and Engineering receiving A, making its disciplinary strength the top among normal universities in China.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other Physics Category-related majors are highly recommended with high social popularity. Teacher training/education majors are divided and wait-and-see. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from about 606,800 in 2025. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 59.8%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 364,700, with slightly intensified competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 3% (2025), not a major source province for local students, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend in historical rankings (accelerating in the last 3 years), the buffer effect of a 9.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, and the stable appeal of the university's top tier (Top 20), with the strong backward shift trend but buffered by enrollment expansion, a slight upward adjustment of 50 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 5951, with a range of 5451 to 6451.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5451), focus on reaching for top majors like Mathematics and Physics.
